name: Tim Kaine
subject: My vote on Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

This is important, and I wanted to share it with you: **I will oppose the nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the United States Supreme Court.**

I came to this decision after diligently studying his record of academic writings and judicial opinions, reading the limited documents we've been provided, interviewing him face-to-face in my office, and observing his testimony before the Senate Judiciary Committee. **It is my belief that Judge Kavanaugh should not be confirmed to the Supreme Court -- particularly at this pivotal time in our nation's history, because he cannot be counted on to serve as an independent check on executive power, or to uphold critical precedents that affect the well-being of millions of Americans.**
* * *
I'd like to tell you a little more about why I will be voting "no" on Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation. This is a long e-mail, but I hope you'll take the time to read my thoughts -- because this is a matter of profound importance to every single American.
* I. First, I have grave concerns about Judge Kavanaugh's commitment to serving as an independent check against unlawful action by the president. I asked Judge Kavanaugh about these matters when I interviewed him -- I was searching for something basic: _Would he have the backbone to stand against a president if the law compelled such a result?_ And I watched his testimony with the same question in mind. I found, at best, ambivalence -- not a firm commitment to independence.

* II. Second, Judge Kavanaugh's views about Supreme Court precedent do not inspire confidence. He has stated in his hearings that he views _Roe v. Wade_ as 'settled law' -- but in a 2003 email while working for the Bush Administration, he resisted characterizing Roe as 'settled law' since the 'Court can always overrule its precedent and three current Justices on the Court would do so.'

The number of justices on the Court who are hostile to reproductive rights has only grown since 2003. And given Judge Kavanaugh's professed admiration for Justice Rehnquist's dissenting opinion in Roe, **there is a significant possibility that he would join that group to deny women their right to make reproductive health care decisions.**

The candid admission that the 'Court can always overrule its precedent' raises a whole series of questions about what other 'settled' areas of law--in an era of 5-4 Supreme Court decisions--might suddenly be unsettled by this nominee. The constitutionality of the Affordable Care Act, the right of same-sex couples to marry, key immigration issues, the acceptability of reasonable rules to reduce gun violence, the ability to detain U.S. citizens as enemy combatants, and so many other issues currently under discussion could shift dramatically with this nominee.

**These matters are more than just hypothetical to families in Virginia. Judge Kavanaugh 's selective refusal to answer questions about issues deeply important to millions of Americans did nothing to allay these fears. **

When the Senate votes on Judge Kavanaugh's confirmation to the Supreme Court of the United States, I will vote "no."

Thank you for reading.

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11d1/3e0906/727076c0/3e3623cf/451357330/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180909_3_FR_TK_kavanaugh-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180909_3_FR_TK_kavanaugh-RS&source=20180909_3_FR_TK_kavanaugh-RS")

Hi,

I've got big news. Thanks to all the help from this great team, we're launching [ **the first TV ad of our campaign**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ft5CZZK8gMoksYGKaV5ez1hu9Tpl93l7) \-- and we want you to be one of the first to see it.

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fCBtcgp7HghRbAqCsbZyBlhu9Tpl93l7)

Every day, Senator Klobuchar works hard on behalf of our entire state. Minnesotans know she's one of the most effective members of Congress, and she doesn't back down from a fight or shy away from working across the aisle. In short, Amy is **_Our Senator._**

Amy is guided by the values she learned growing up in Minnesota. She goes to all of Minnesota's 87 counties every year, she refuses to leave anyone behind, and she focuses on what matters -- getting results for the people of Minnesota.

**Please share our new ad with your friends and family, and help us show Minnesota why Amy is our Senator.**

Thanks,

Wendy

name: Mel Hall
subject: Announcing: the Hardworking Hoosiers tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Congress is broken. So this week, I'm kicking off the Hardworking Hoosiers tour to highlight hardworking Hoosiers across the 2nd District and share my plans for making Congress work again for Hoosier families.

**[We're keeping costs low as I drive across the district, but we do need to pay for things like gas, campaign literature and ads to get the word out. Can you chip in $5 now to fund our Hardworking Hoosiers tour?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vNc4SC44P-dz7iMpgNSnwx3lBcQR3MikHTnKk_bIUMI=/0Sd5y5aqIQmZ5zlopYVu-MRm64vVm8XxZmQpVFuvmrY=?refcode=em180910_hht)**

Yesterday, I met with the hardworking men and women of Sheet Metal Workers Local 20. On Sunday, I'll be attending a health care town hall in South Bend. And throughout the tour, I'll be visiting factories, local businesses, farms and more to learn what hardworking Hoosiers need most from Congress.

The best ideas to get Congress working again for Hoosiers will come from Hoosiers. That's why I'm hitting the road on my Hardworking Hoosiers tour - to listen to you.

**I look forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail. And in the meantime, can I count you to contribute now to kick off the tour and help our campaign spread the word?**

name: Jared Page
subject: President Trump needs your help!
body:
All,

We are 57 days away from retiring Joe Manchin and electing Patrick Morrisey to the United States Senate. Within the last few weeks, our campaign has gained tremendous momentum. While the momentum is on our side, we still need your help to make sure that we defeat Joe Manchin and give President Trump a Senator that he can count on. This Saturday, September 15, the WVGOP and RNC will be conducting a National Day of Action across West Virginia. The Day of Action will encompass a day full of canvassing, campaigning, and phone banking by deplorables all across our great state. Together, we can make history in West Virginia and elect Patrick Morrisey to the U.S. Senate. To partake in this historic event, please fill out the link provided below. A representative from the WVGOP will reach out to you immediately to assist you in Making West Virginia Great Again! We hope to see you on Saturday!

Sincerely,

Jared A. Page
Regional Political Director
Morrisey for Senate Inc.
[jared@patrickmorrisey.com](mailto:jared@patrickmorrisey.com)

[https://gop.com/national-day-of-action-september-2018/](https://gop.com/national-day-of-action-september-2018/)

name: Khizr Khan
subject: My Senator

body:
| | Derek, Tim Kaine is my Senator and I am grateful for that.

I trust his wisdom and leadership. I trust his judgment. I always know that Senator Kaine will aim to do the right thing and represent not just my best interests, but those of every Virginian.

Because of this, I've donated to his re-election, I've volunteered my time at his offices, and I go to events for his campaign when he comes to my town. **It 's also why I'm writing you today:**
* \-- Senator Kaine's staff tells me that this is his most critical month. They need to hit their goal before the deadline is closed to fund the next two months of the campaign.

* \-- I also know that the actions we do as citizens matter. Speaking up, supporting, and donating to campaigns can decide elections.

**So today I 'm asking you to join me in supporting Tim Kaine so he meets his fundraising deadline and can fully fund a Democratic victory in my home state. It is so important that Senator Kaine can continue to serve and defend Virginia's values and protect our basic rights, i.e. health care, sustainable wages for Virginians, our environment, safe schools and neighborhoods for our children, support for veterans and veterans' families, and upholding our constitutional order - all of which are under attack by the current administration in Washington.

He has done so admirably for many years, and I would like him to represent me for many more. I've spoken at the Democratic Convention and campaigned for Democrats across the country, _but this is personal for me as a Virginian._

This is my Senator. He knows my family, he knows our loss, and he knows our mission now to elect representatives who will advance our _true, shared American values_. We are a Gold Star family that has made the ultimate sacrifice for our country and Derek, we are also a proud Virginia family.

**We need to re-elect Senator Kaine and Democratic congressional candidates in Virginia, Derek. I hope you 'll help today.**

subject: 🔥 Early voting starts in just 11 Days!
body:
** Early Voting is right around the corner!
------------------------------------------------------------
The election is getting closer every day. So close, in fact, that early voting is starting in just 11 days! That's right, you can vote as early as September 21st. If you are looking for information about how/where to vote, and how you can get involved in the election this year, then you can check out this one source link we put together for the 2018 election. CD6.Info (http://cd6.info?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=ed31726b75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_10_03_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-ed31726b75-9291445)

Donate Today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=Sep10th&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=ed31726b75-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_10_03_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-ed31726b75-9291445)

** DFL Day of Action
------------------------------------------------------------

body:
This is great news, but remember, Peter, "toss-up" doesn't mean a sure win!
| | Peter, In case you missed it, our campaign received some welcome news last week: **Another respected national publication -- this time,_Politico_ \-- named our race a toss-up, and _NBC News_ named our district one of the top Democratic pick-up opportunities nationwide.** **This is great news, but remember, Peter, "toss-up" doesn't mean a sure win! **We have a lot of work to do between now and November 6 to bring this race home for Virginia families, and we are depending on your help to do it.**[Will you make a grassroots donation today so we can put this toss-up in the win column?](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGBdzwIp_7Ynvp9OyPeomMOoTfzyj6aH6L5wFOs1-Ag=/vwdX-N5ORw7f2WQXd6zlfotkavdgXeQXOgv9zldiWgM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.10_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** This ratings change _(our fifth in just a few months!)_ confirms what we see and hear on the ground every day. Voters are eager for new leaders who will focus on solving real issues for Central Virginians, like Abigail -- not those who turn everything into a partisan fight, like Rep. Dave Brat and his friends in the extreme House Freedom Caucus do. Our team is confident that this race will continue to move in our direction over the next two months. But the Republican Super PACs supporting Rep. Brat are mobilizing against us -- their first negative ad went up on TV last week -- **so this race will be a fight until the very end.** [**Peter, consider making a donation to Team Spanberger today so we can stay in the fight and then elect Abigail in November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGBdzwIp_7Ynvp9OyPeomMOoTfzyj6aH6L5wFOs1-Ag=/vwdX-N5ORw7f2WQXd6zlfotkavdgXeQXOgv9zldiWgM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.10_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGBdzwIp_7Ynvp9OyPeomMOoTfzyj6aH6L5wFOs1-Ag=/vwdX-N5ORw7f2WQXd6zlfotkavdgXeQXOgv9zldiWgM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.10_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SGBdzwIp_7Ynvp9OyPeomMOoTfzyj6aH6L5wFOs1-Ag=/vwdX-N5ORw7f2WQXd6zlfotkavdgXeQXOgv9zldiWgM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zW4jjItLq_sCgHtHP_w1o64ZSLWuNL58UFC_9xd_YkA=/tMN7ActbAX_b9986fjoHm4gbr1fZaujdWyMBb_wFDxA=?gpsid=37_57_3497&refcode=em18_180910_NBCwk_LG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180910_NBCwk_LG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&recur_weekly=yes)
---

Dear Friend,

_NBC News_ just released their list of the governor's offices that are most likely to switch parties in 2018. Spoiler alert: Nevada is near the top.

**We can only accomplish this mission if we all come together to support Steve Sisolak and keep at it until November 6.**

**[There are just 8 weeks left-- chip in $8 or more to Steve Sisolak each week until election day to make sure we get this done.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zW4jjItLq_sCgHtHP_w1o64ZSLWuNL58UFC_9xd_YkA=/tMN7ActbAX_b9986fjoHm4gbr1fZaujdWyMBb_wFDxA=?gpsid=37_57_3497&refcode=em18_180910_NBCwk_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180910_NBCwk_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&recur_weekly=yes)**

There's so much more than "D" vs. "R" on the ballot this November. Steve is a proven leader whose accomplishments for students, teachers, workers, and families speak for themselves. He's the only one with a real plan to keep Nevada moving forward.

Adam Laxalt has used his tenure as AG to be a lackey for special interests and Trump's radical agenda. There's no question that he'd continue to ignore what's best for working people here in Nevada if he wins this thing.

The White House • September 10, 2018
## Make no mistake: This is an economic turnaround
##
##
**President Donald J. Trump’s critics** are attempting a neat trick: After months of denying America’s recent economic success, they are now owning up to it—and reassigning credit to the Obama Administration. “The economy remains essentially the same sturdy one Trump inherited from Barack Obama,” Christopher Rugaber writes. **Today, Council of Economic Advisers** Chairman Kevin Hassett took to the White House briefing podium to dispel that myth. His case, by the evidence:
* Business investment was on a downswing prior to President Trump taking office. It’s now up by more than $300 billion over the 2016 trend.
* Orders and shipments of capital goods were on a downward trend before President Trump’s election. They’ve jumped sharply since.
* Business applications were on a flat trend prior to President Trump’s Inauguration. They have now surged upward.

**On statistic after statistic,** after years of weak and inconsistent economic trends under the previous Administration, President Trump has delivered for Americans. **“If anyone were to assert** that the capital spending boom that we’re seeing right now was a continuation of the trend that President Trump inherited, then, well, you know they wouldn’t get a high grade in graduate school,” Chairman Hassett said. [**The facts: “An economic turnaround of historic proportions”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEwLjk0Njk5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMC45NDY5OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg0Mjc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/americas-economy-booming-thanks-president-donald-j-trump/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **In their words** : **[Why the great news for American workers should continue](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEwLjk0Njk5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMC45NDY5OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg0Mjc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/new-york-post-great-economic-news-american-workers-continue/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
## Protecting American soldiers and citizens from unjust prosecution
##
**It is a fundamental principle** of international law that a treaty is binding only on its own, consenting parties. The United States is no such party to the International Criminal Court (ICC), which threatens both our Constitution and our sovereignty. **National Security Advisor John Bolton** minced no words when explaining America’s position on the ICC in a speech today. “We will not cooperate with the ICC. We will provide no assistance to the ICC. And we certainly will not join the ICC,” he said. **“We will let the ICC die** on its own. After all, for all intents and purposes, the ICC is already dead to us.” **On November 3, 2017** , the Chief Prosecutor of the ICC released a statement on her request to begin an investigation into the situation in Afghanistan. She indicated this investigation would include war crimes allegedly committed by U.S. Service Members and intelligence professionals during the war in Afghanistan. **If the ICC formally proceeds,** the Trump Administration will consider all appropriate steps to protect American citizens from the reach of an unaccountable and illegitimate global body. **[On the ICC, President Trump will put the American People first.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEwLjk0Njk5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMC45NDY5OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg0Mjc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/protecting-american-constitutionalism-sovereignty-international-criminal-court/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) ** **Watch:** **[An announcement on the Palestine Liberation Organization office in D.C.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTEwLjk0Njk5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxMC45NDY5OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg0Mjc2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1039261553428770817)**

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: The establishment is running scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Revolution is coming to New York state and the establishment is running scared.
#
Friends,
Revolution is coming to New York state and the establishment is running scared. During our rally this past weekend with New York's Our Revolution-endorsed candidates, the New York State Democratic Committee resorted to fear-mongering by sending a hit piece against Cynthia Nixon that used scare tactics to turn voters against her.
**Unlike the New York State Democratic Party and the billionaires who buy them, we will do everything to win - but we will not do _anything_ to win.**
This weekend we turned out hundreds of New Yorkers who are ready to vote out establishment Democrats and vote in bold, progressive leaders.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabaa/2075301512/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180910-full&noskip=true")
_Our Revolution supporters join a candidate rally in New York._
This fight between now and Thursday's primary election is more important than ever. **Cynthia Nixon, Jumaane Williams, Zephyr Teachout, Julia Salazar** and others are running to take on the Independent Democratic Caucus (IDC), Governor Andrew Cuomo, and the entire political establishment.
The establishment Democrats who comprise the IDC have spent the past few years caucusing with Republicans in the State Senate for personal and political benefit and against the interests of the people. This Thursday, we have the chance to elect bold progressive leaders who will represent all of us.
Our endorsed candidates and dozens of local Our Revolution groups from Long Island to Rochester are knocking on doors and making phone calls every day because we know that in these dire times, it is not enough to just have a "D" next to your name.
[**We need your help. Can you pitch in $5 so that we can text, call, and get out the vote in the primary election this Thursday?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabaa/2075301512/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180910-full&noskip=true")
From the local level to the top of the ticket, we are winning in the margins by registering first-time voters, inspiring infrequent voters to get involved in primary elections, and building local political power across the state. In just two years more than 650,000 New Yorkers have registered to vote and with your support, we can ensure they turn out this Thursday for the primary election.
New York should be leading on Medicare for All, getting big money out of politics, and eliminating the vast levels of income and wealth inequality. Instead, the state government cozies up to lobbyists and special interests to a degree that is downright criminal.
The good news is that we have the opportunity to change it. By supporting candidates, leading the way on progressive issues, and building grassroots coalitions of progressive activists, our local groups are making the difference in Thursday's election.
[**Help support this critical work as we head into the final primary of 2018. Let's show the New York State Democratic Party that when we win, we win on the issues, not on fear - make a $5 contribution today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabaa/2075301512/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180910-full&noskip=true")
This is our chance to make history. Thank you for helping us seize this opportunity for real, progressive change.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabaa/2075301512/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180910-full&noskip=true")**
_Senator Nina Turner joined candidates Cynthia Nixon, Zephyr Teachout, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Christine Pellegrino at a get out the vote rally in New York._
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabaa/2075301512/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-ny?refcode=em180910-full&noskip=true")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabd4/2075301512/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a96c/bed43eb/77006e35/75fcabd6/2075301512/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

Friend, make no mistake... we are the underdogs now.

The media and the leftist elites are going to count us out.

They are going to outspend us.

They are going to say we can’t win.

But friend, I’m no stranger to tough campaigns, and I’m no stranger to being labeled the underdog. Heck, as a working mom, I’ve spent my whole life as the underdog.

I know, if we work together, we WILL prevail.

Now, with the clock ticking down to the final days of this election cycle... I’m going ALL OUT and I need your help. I’ve set up a DEFEAT TAMMY FUND with a goal of raising $75,000 by September 30th. [**Will you be one of my first contributors by donating now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fa603f48aeab4a488f5fb625a6a444c1&_e=qlpKTXZSmhYWvtvxZ2H0fOUMOGtlz8y4b63C7V-tnSNMZxJsGN97Vj-mqNTDN0dHJsU3GoI6GkGNv-SE_NstrPfLXfqOy6u4DaRaznSnpzz3hTCds_MA8JTBZqla0DubVuMNGC-rD0baS6kGK1y9lqr93gjUNxqluVmU7Qly0tEgEIfe0iHkUAdvLdIJmOtVJUhxmvwFPS_rIk2UVRSt-QgFxrdEgF4-ggMUjd3HQsXSVJTf_TBa7lI13Kv7uOZgdPn5THjuJUeEHsdnO7K-hmW_iHy9P-sfIlJeW_0EdW9fZF3rE5FTprlWSCrEPnDHsN5Lsw9fOkz4Pvh20j9e2YNx3x3xDh9b6mDYkHKF6boaqlMQjpzej2-gRoMQjc9LbJj7JIV04f_0Qa8RB1yjILvfpgBxO_awqRTbGqKBUNs%3D)

Friend, the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November.

But out-of-touch politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She won’t vote for true border security and build the wall. She stands in the way of lowering health care costs and premiums. And friend, she didn’t even vote to let you keep an extra $1,600 of your hard-earned dollars through tax reform!

The media and the leftist elites are going to count us out. They are going to outspend us. They are going to say we can’t win. But friend, I’m no stranger to tough campaigns, and I’m no stranger to being labeled the underdog. Heck, as a working mom, I’ve spent my whole life as the underdog. I know, if we work together, we WILL prevail. Now, with the clock ticking down to the final days of this election cycle... I’m going ALL OUT and I need your help. I’ve set up a DEFEAT TAMMY FUND with a goal of raising $75,000 by September 30th. Friend, the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November. But out-of-touch politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She won’t vote for true border security and build the wall. She stands in the way of lowering health care costs and premiums. And friend, she didn’t even vote to let you keep an extra $1,600 of your hard-earned dollars through tax reform! That is unacceptable. I know that if I get to Washington, I will make things happen by standing by the America First agenda we all believe in. This goal of $75,000 dollars for the Defeat Tammy Fund will help us get our message out there and win the support of Wisconsin voters everywhere. Let’s win this thing. Peter,
**Big news in the race against Steve King!** A new poll released by Emerson College Polling shows J.D. Scholten within 10 points of eight-term incumbent Steve King!
These numbers continue the trend of the race moving in our direction. For context, King won this district by 24% in 2014, and by 22% in 2016. As the election draws closer, it’s becoming quite clear that this race is going to come down to the wire.

Between Truckee and Tahoe City we also attempted to contact 735 voters and had 332 conversations with voters (not to mention the ones that weren't on the walk or phone lists!) within the last week!

We have around 2400 voters left to reach out to before September 25, so **we really need everyone to sign up for _at least_ one shift this week!** If everyone just does one shift a week for the next eight weeks we can absolutely win this thing! If you want to do the same shift every week, that would also be great. Together we can do this!

** _
_**
**_CANVASS LAUNCHES_**

**** _TRUCKEE_****
**When:** Saturday and Sunday, September 15-16
**Where:** Truckee Office, 11425 Donner Pass Rd, Truckee, CA 96161
**Shifts:** 9am-12pm, 12pm-3pm, and 3pm-6pm

** _NORTH SHORE (Tahoe Vista and Carnelian Bay)_**
**When:** Saturday, September 15
**Where:** Tee May's House, 7201 Pino Ave, Tahoe Vista, CA**(****
Corner of Pino and East and West Agatam)
**
**Shift:** 9am-1pm
**
**
** _TAHOE CITY_**
**When:** Sunday, September 16
**Where: Syd's Bagelry
, 550 N Lake Blvd, Tahoe City, CA 96145
**
**
Shifts: 9am-12pm and 12pm-3pm
**
**
**
** _OTHER TIMES_**
You can canvass any day you want! Just let Jackie know and she will get you set-up with a walk list and materials.

**
**_PHONE BANKING_**
** _
_**
**_Wednesday, September 12, 5:30pm-8:00pm_ :** Truckee Office, 11425 Donner Pass Rd, Truckee, CA 96161

_Other Times:_ **
You can phone bank from home anytime! Just let Jackie know and she will get you set-up.
**
**

**
**_PLEASE RSVP_**
**Please, please let us know which events you will be attending so we have enough materials and refreshments - or if you want to canvass or phone bank at different times! Please RSVP to all events to:**[jacqueline@morse4congress.com](mailto:jacqueline@morse4congress.com) and [ljtirman@msn.com](mailto:ljtirman@msn.com)

Friend,

**Who is Bob Hugin?**

For months, he has told New Jersey voters that he is an independent leader. He has ads plastered on television screens across the state saying, he is a "different kind of Republican."

Now Hugin is reminding Donald Trump's supporters that he's all-in for Trump.

It's more proof that Hugin will always be on Trump's side. He'll never be on ours.

[**Bob Hugin is an ultra-right-wing conservative who is spending millions on misleading TV ads in an attempt to buy New Jersey's U.S. Senate seat for Donald Trump. Chip in $5 or more right now to help Democratic Senator Bob Menendez fight back and win this November.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ccf/3af3c5d/3ace96d4/4ec3c8c2/2326923457/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-hugintrump?gpsid=5_73_3503&refcode=em18_180910_HugTru_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180910_HugTru_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Bob+Hugin+is+an+ultrarightwing+conservat")

| | Derek, a new poll was just released, and it's the _closest of the entire election._ A June poll showed Tim Kaine with an 18 point lead over Corey Stewart.[ But another recent poll said that Tim is less than five points ahead of Stewart, who calls himself "Trump before Trump was Trump."](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11da/3e0906/724e5866/3e362537/2069052327/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180906_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-++But+another+recent+poll+said+that+Tim+i&utm_campaign=20180910_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND-RS&source=20180910_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND-RS") | [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11da/3e0906/724e5866/3e362536/2069052327/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180906_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20180910_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND-RS&source=20180910_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND-RS")

POOLHOUSE + Cygnal Statewide Virginia Poll
[September 6th, 2018](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11da/3e0906/724e5866/3e362535/2069052327/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180906_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+September+6th+2018&utm_campaign=20180910_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND-RS&source=20180910_2_FR_TEAM_Poll-LDND-RS")
_Poll Graphic via POOLHOUSE + Cygnal_
If there's one thing we learned in 2014 and 2016, it's that **we cannot afford to take anything for granted. So here 's the plan:**
* The work we do has never been more important. In 2014, we all watched as Senator Warner's seemingly unbeatable lead turned into a one point nail-biter. We just can't ignore the warning signs again.

* We have a critical fundraising goal for September. The money we raise this month, in the face of this poll, will allow us to run the competitive campaign that we need to.

Waking up on November 7th with a Trump mini-me representing Virginia families in the United States Senate and wishing we could have done more to stop it would be nothing short of a disaster.

**So Derek, this is the perfect time to chip into the campaign if you 've been waiting to do so. Will you rush a donation of just $5 to make sure we hold on to Tim Kaine's Senate seat?**

body:

| | | Last week, the Senate Judiciary Committee questioned Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh. Needless to say, I wasn't impressed.

**Kavanaugh dodged question after question and was horrifyingly extreme in his positions when he did decide to speak up. There 's no doubt in my mind: I'm opposing his nomination -- [will you be one of the 10,000 citizen supporters I need to join me in showing that Americans oppose Kavanaugh?](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b718/43d8135f/67068626/51001d12/2924773478/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/say-no-to-kavanaugh?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+will+you+be+one+of+the+10000+citizen+sup&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1")**

* * *

Last week we saw the Senate Judiciary Committee question Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh, and one thing is already clear: this man has **no business** serving on the Supreme Court.

On substance, his extreme views are dangerously out of touch with most Americans. He indicated he would roll back decades of progress on women's rights, voting rights, health care, and workers' rights. Kavanaugh's broad view of presidential power reveals he will do little to hold Trump accountable.

And in an unprecedented level of secrecy, Republican leadership continues to hide millions of records from Kavanaugh's time in the Bush White House, making it impossible to properly vet him for a lifetime appointment.
**[SAY NO TO KAVANAUGH](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b718/43d8135f/67068626/51001d15/2924773478/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/say-no-to-kavanaugh?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+SAY+NO+TO+KAVANAUGH&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1")** President Trump's nomination will shift the balance of the court and change the fabric of our country for generations. It's not enough to just oppose Kavanaugh -- we have to show Republicans how strong our opposition is.

Why? Because **there is too much at stake for us to do anything less.**

[**That 's why I need you to raise your voice with me. Add your name here and be one of the 10,000 supporters we need to stand against confirming Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b718/43d8135f/67068626/51001d14/2924773478/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/say-no-to-kavanaugh?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+need+you+to+raise+your+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1")
**[OPPOSE KAVANAUGH](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b718/43d8135f/67068626/51001d17/2924773478/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/say-no-to-kavanaugh?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+OPPOSE+KAVANAUGH&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180910_1_1")** Thanks for your support,

Our campaign is surging.
#

Peter -

Friends,

Florida has always been a battleground state -- but our Governor's race is "shaping up to be a close, nationally-watched contest."

So, Ron DeSantis resigned from Congress today to focus all of his efforts on getting lots of cash from big special interests -- millions of dollars he'll then use in an attempt to tear our campaign down with false, misleading television ads.

**[That's just what Trump-inspired politicians do these days. If you want to help prove we can win in Florida with the backing of regular people, then chip in $5 or more right now to help lead Mayor Andrew Gillum and Chris King to victory.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb373a/9e00690/5a24793e/240155c9/2173098114/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-desantis-resigns-congress?gpsid=13_55_3515&refcode=em18_180910_resign_fnd_gq_act_DS_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180910_resign_fnd_gq_act_DS_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Thats+just+what+Trumpinspired+politician")**

Floridians deserve leaders who will unite our communities, not turn us against each other. It's time we uplift Floridians across the state, and bring people together again -- because we all do better when our state and economy works for everyone.

While Ron DeSantis focuses all of his time on special interests, we'll stay focused on building this campaign the right way. With people like you, and grassroots supporters from Tallahassee to the Keys.

That's how we're going to take back the Governor's mansion on Tuesday, November 6.

**[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help Mayor Andrew Gillum and Chris King get out the vote and win this election?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb373a/9e00690/5a24793e/240155c8/2173098114/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-desantis-resigns-congress?gpsid=13_55_3515&refcode=em18_180910_resign_fnd_gq_act_DS_GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180910_resign_fnd_gq_act_DS_GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+chip+in+5+or+whatever+you+can+a")**

Thank you,

Geoff Burgan
